title: Public reading 4-26-25 Leviticus 13.40-54 / Matthew 15.1-20
author: joshualinog
excerpt: - Josh interrupts Ricky  - Ricky corrects Josh, and continues sharing really potent reason Pharisees were condemned by Yeshua: It is because they knew the commands, purposes, and intentions (???) and
content:
- Josh interrupts Ricky 
- Ricky corrects Josh, and continues sharing really potent reason Pharisees were condemned by Yeshua: It is because they knew the commands, purposes, and intentions (???) and they perverted it 
- Matt shares the potential heart (motive) for a priest, not just to keep uncleanness out, but to want to bring that son of Israel back into Israel. They keep going back and examining so they can declare "clean" over this loved son
- Gideon says every plant my Father did not plant will be uprooted means their tradition will be uprooted because God didn't plant it
